text:
Couldn't open mixer device /dev/sound/mixer


IBM Thinkpad R50e
Audio Specs:

Analog Devices AD1981B AC97 Soft Audio 
AC97 2.3 compatible 
Speaker technology 
Mono speaker 
Volume up, down, and mute buttons 
Two audio jacks: 
One for external stereo speakers or headphone 
One for an external microphone
